metadata.description: Open Claude plugins from Luminik. Practical skills for AEs, SDRs, and event marketers running outbound and side-event invites around B2B trade shows and conferences.

plugins.name: event-outbound
plugins.description: Create buyer-first email and LinkedIn outreach for B2B events. Give it event context, ICP, target personas, and sender context. It drafts validated pre-event, day-of, and post-event touches. Built from 20K+ outbound touches reviewed across 50+ fintech, cybersecurity, and B2B SaaS events that sourced $6M+ in pipeline. Runs inside Claude Code and Claude Cowork with no extra API key. The bundled local validator checks subject length, inbox-preview opener, channel length, illumination question, pronoun ratio, direct CTA, permission-to-send gating, forced event phrasing, and a 10-category cliche blocklist. Includes fully rendered Black Hat USA 2026 and Money20/20 Europe 2026 worked examples plus Singapore Fintech Festival 2026 input fixtures.
